overview: Rakdos Affinity is a two-color variant of Pauper's famous Affinity deck that prioritizes aggressive early pressure over Grixis versions. It combines direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast with a fast clock of Frogmite and Clockwork Percussionist to overwhelm opponents quickly. Despite the streamlined mana base, it retains the core Ichor Wellspring and sacrifice engine for card advantage, while leveraging Refurbished Familiar and Blood Fountain for attrition.
win_conditions: Aggressive early clock with Frogmite and Clockwork Percussionist
Direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast
Card advantage via Ichor Wellspring and sacrifice effects
Attrition loops with Refurbished Familiar and Blood Fountain

keep_criteria: Hands with early artifacts like Frogmite or Clockwork Percussionist
Hands containing one-mana removal or damage spells
Hands with 2-3 lands for consistent early turns
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early threats or interactive spells
Hands with too many lands or high-cost cards that delay the aggressive clock

examples.reason: Provides a turn-one threat, turn-one removal, and a mana sink to enable early pressure and sequencing.

early_game: Play Frogmite and Clockwork Percussionist to establish an aggressive clock and Affinity discount
Use Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt for mana-efficient removal and direct damage
mid_game: Deploy Ichor Wellspring and Nihil Spellbomb to generate card advantage and disrupt opponent recursion
Cast Refurbished Familiar to reduce opponent resources or draw cards in attrition matches
late_game: Utilize Blood Fountain as a mana sink to repeatedly cast Refurbished Familiar or Myr Enforcer
Play Makeshift Munitions for recurring removal against token decks and to guarantee reach

key_cards.name: Frogmite
key_cards.notes: Strong creature that can be played for free; important glue when sequencing threats on the second and third turns.

key_cards.name: Clockwork Percussionist
key_cards.notes: Benefits from draw effects and counts towards Affinity; key benefit of playing only two colors.

key_cards.name: Refurbished Familiar
key_cards.notes: Reduces opponent resources or offers card advantage; best target for Blood Fountain.

key_cards.name: Blood Fountain
key_cards.notes: Offers two artifacts for one mana; enables repeated casting of Refurbished Familiar or Myr Enforcer in attrition games.

key_cards.name: Ichor Wellspring
key_cards.notes: Best combination with Deadly Dispute variants; offers an extra draw on its own.

key_cards.name: Nihil Spellbomb
key_cards.notes: Essential against Tolarian Terror and Dread Return; provides cheap artifact for Affinity and extra draws.

key_cards.name: Galvanic Blast
key_cards.notes: Best one-mana removal and damage spell in Pauper; obvious choice for artifact archetype.

key_cards.name: Lightning Bolt
key_cards.notes: Prioritizes mana efficiency and speed in less interactive matchups.

key_cards.name: Makeshift Munitions
key_cards.notes: Feeds off artifacts for recurring removal against Faeries and Elves; guarantees reach in longer games.

sequencing_tips: Sequence Frogmite early to set up Affinity discount for turn 2-3 threats
Use Blood Fountain as a mana sink to repeatedly cast Refurbished Familiar or Myr Enforcer
Prioritize Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt for speed in less interactive matchups
Deploy Nihil Spellbomb to guarantee extra draws and disrupt opponent recursion

matchups.advice: Side in Pyroblast and Nihil Spellbomb to resolve threats that block Myr Enforcer and survive.
Side in Pyroblast, Makeshift Munitions, and End the Festivities to handle X/1 creatures and provide recurring removal.
Side in Extract a Confession, End the Festivities, and Cast Down to handle creatures that dodge burn spells.
Side in Campfire to hold the game with two life per turn and keep Burn decks in check.
Side in Makeshift Munitions and End the Festivities for recurring removal and increased board pressure.
Side in Nihil Spellbomb to disrupt recursive potential and combo pieces.
Side in Nihil Spellbomb for midrange mirrors to worry about the recursive potential of Blood Fountain.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Rakdos Affinity relies on fewer colors to play with more aggressive cards... combining damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast with a more aggressive clock of Clockwork Percussionist and Frogmite to pressure the opponent earlier.

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: combining damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast with a more aggressive clock of Clockwork Percussionist and Frogmite to pressure the opponent earlier.

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Frogmite... is an important glue when sequencing threats on the second and third turns... Blood Fountain offers two artifacts for one mana and becomes an effective mana sink, where resorting to two copies of Refurbished Familiar or Myr Enforcer makes a considerable difference
